---
title: "Complexity and Entropy Summary Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, results = "asis")
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(readr)
library(fs)
```

```{r load-data, echo=FALSE}
# Load cleaned RDS files (adjust path as needed)
complexity_df <- readRDS(here::here("output/global_cancer/reports/complexity_cleaned.rds"))
entropy_df <- readRDS(here::here("output/global_cancer/reports/entropy_cleaned.rds"))

p_thresh <- 0.05
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
<!-- .table-striped tbody tr:nth-of-type(odd) { -->
<!--   background-color: #e6f9e6;  /* light green */ -->
<!-- } -->
```

```{r generate-report, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

for (engine in c("complexity", "entropy")) {
  df <- if (engine == "complexity")
    complexity_df
  else
    entropy_df
  cat(glue("## Engine: {engine}\n\n"))
  
  for (chip_id in unique(df$chip)) {
    chip_df <- filter(df, chip == chip_id)
    cat(glue("### CHIP: {chip_id}\n\n"))
    
    for (cmp in unique(chip_df$comparison)) {
      cmp_df <- filter(chip_df, comparison == cmp)
      # cat(glue("<hr>\n\n#### Comparison: {cmp}\n\n"))
      cat(glue('<hr style="border: 2px solid black; margin-top: 2em; margin-bottom: 2em;">\n\n#### Comparison: {cmp}\n\n'))

      # ALL Probes
      all_row <- filter(cmp_df, gene_set_normalized == "ALL")
      if (nrow(all_row) == 1) {
        p_val <- signif(all_row$p_perm, 4)
        direction <- coalesce(all_row$direction,
                              all_row$spectral_direction,
                              all_row$shannon_direction)
        cat(glue(
          "**ALL Probes:** p = {p_val} | {str_to_title(direction)}\n\n"
        ))
      } else {
        cat("*ALL Probes:* (missing or malformed)\n\n")
      }
      
      # GO Terms Table
      go_rows <- cmp_df |> filter(str_starts(gene_set_normalized, "GO:"),
                                  !is.na(p_perm),
                                  p_perm <= p_thresh)
      if (nrow(go_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- coalesce(go_rows$gene_set_name, go_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        dirn <- coalesce(go_rows$direction,
                         go_rows$spectral_direction,
                         go_rows$shannon_direction)
        pval <- signif(go_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(
          Description = desc,
          `p-value` = pval,
          Direction = str_to_title(dirn)
        )
        print(
          kableExtra::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant GO Terms") |>
            kableExtra::kable_styling(
              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
              full_width = TRUE
            )
        )
      } else {
        cat("*No significant GO terms.*\n\n")
      }
      
      # KEGG Table
      kegg_rows <- cmp_df |> filter(
        str_detect(gene_set_normalized, "^[0-9]{4,5}$") &
          (p_perm <= p_thresh | kegg_cancer == TRUE)
      )
      if (nrow(kegg_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- coalesce(kegg_rows$gene_set_name,
                         kegg_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        dirn <- coalesce(
          kegg_rows$direction,
          kegg_rows$spectral_direction,
          kegg_rows$shannon_direction
        )
        pval <- signif(kegg_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(
          Description = desc,
          `p-value` = pval,
          Direction = str_to_title(dirn)
        )
        print(
          kableExtra::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant KEGG Pathways") |>
            kableExtra::kable_styling(
              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
              full_width = TRUE
            )
        )
      } else {
        cat("*No significant KEGG pathways.*\n\n")
      }
      
      # HALLMARK Table
      hallmark_rows <- cmp_df |> filter(
        str_detect(gene_set_normalized, "HALLMARK"),
        !is.na(p_perm),
        p_perm <= p_thresh
      )
      if (nrow(hallmark_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- coalesce(hallmark_rows$gene_set_name,
                         hallmark_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        dirn <- coalesce(
          hallmark_rows$direction,
          hallmark_rows$spectral_direction,
          hallmark_rows$shannon_direction
        )
        pval <- signif(hallmark_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(
          Description = desc,
          `p-value` = pval,
          Direction = str_to_title(dirn)
        )
        print(
          kableExtra::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant HALLMARK Genes") |>
            kableExtra::kable_styling(
              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
              full_width = TRUE
            )
        )
      } else {
        cat("*No significant Hallmark genes.*\n\n")
      }
    }
  }
}
```
